## Summary

Describe the scoped change and the user-visible or operator-visible outcome.

## Change Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Infra / Workflow

## Workflow Path

- [ ] Trivial
- [ ] Focused
- [ ] Full

## Behavior Change

- [ ] No behavior change
- [ ] Behavior changed intentionally
- [ ] Bug fix with reproducible behavior

## Verification Level

- [ ] V0
- [ ] V1
- [ ] V2

## Governance Impact

- [ ] No governance artifact change required
- [ ] ROADMAP.md updated
- [ ] VISION.md updated
- [ ] RISK_REGISTER.md updated
- [ ] ADR created or updated

## Workflow Artifacts

- [ ] `STATE.md` updated when required
- [ ] Relevant plan updated when required
- [ ] Summary or verification note added when required

## Documentation Impact

- [ ] No durable docs changed
- [ ] README updated
- [ ] docs/ updated
- [ ] .planning/ updated

## TDD

- [ ] Not applicable
- [ ] Test added or updated before implementation
- [ ] Existing test reproduced the bug before the fix

## Test Matrix

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] E2E tests
- [ ] Manual validation only

## Security Impact

- [ ] No security-relevant impact
- [ ] Auth or session changed
- [ ] Authorization or permissions changed
- [ ] Public endpoint or input parsing changed
- [ ] Secrets, credentials, or external exposure changed

## Validation

- [ ] `bash scripts/validate-workflow.sh`
- [ ] Targeted tests or manual checks completed
- [ ] Security validation completed when applicable

## Risks / Follow-ups

List residual risk, deferred work, or explicit follow-up items.
